vhs-tape-evangelion-copy_file1.desc:
VHS Tape - Evangelion! - Copy

Video Size: 720x480
Length: 2:03:30

Neon Genesis Evangelion[4] (Japanese: 新世紀エヴァンゲリオン, Hepburn: Shinseiki Evangerion, lit. "New Century Gospel") is a Japanese mecha anime television series produced by Gainax and Tatsunoko Production, directed by Hideaki Anno and broadcast on TV Tokyo from October 1995 to March 1996. The cast included Megumi Ogata as Shinji Ikari, Kotono Mitsuishi as Misato Katsuragi, Megumi Hayashibara as Rei Ayanami, and Yūko Miyamura as Asuka Langley Soryu. Music for the series was composed by Shirō Sagisu.

youre-dreaming-while-taking-a-mid-july-a.show: You're Dreaming While Taking A Mid-July Afternoon Nap In 2000 With The Ceiling Fan On (2023)
youre-dreaming-while-taking-a-mid-july-a.episode: You're Dreaming While Taking A Mid-July Afternoon Nap In 2000 With The Ceiling Fan On (2023).mp4
youre-dreaming-while-taking-a-mid-july-a.desc: You're Dreaming While Taking A Mid-July Afternoon Nap In 2000 With The Ceiling Fan On is exactly how it is described in the title. Over-an-hour of a re-enactment of a literal dream, from the moment you've entered the dream state to when you suddenly wake up from a nightmare. What if your dreams were able to be recorded like a DVR or VCR and rewatched at your own leisure? It's nostalgic, familiar, dream-like, slow-paced just as a dream would be, eerie, and nightmarish. This is entirely a creative visual arts project that I wanted to do and to bring the feeling of a full dream cycle in real-time to the screen. Shoutout to The Complex found footage Backrooms game and every visual artist creating their own versions and levels/videos based off of it. This is just another insertion into the pool of analog VHS dreamscape horror. Also includes old television commercials and clips from The Rugrats, Sesame Street, The Mighty Boosh, AI Seinfield: Watch Me Forever from Frumess' YT, Super Sentai, Check It Our W/ Steve Brule, Eraserhead (1977), "Cursed face chases man" from Igor Bronshtein's YT, Courage The Cowardly Dog, Rockwell's Somebody's Watching Me segments, Banana Splits 2008, and Cyberpunk 2077.

five-nights-of-waking-dreams_file0.desc:
Five Nights of Waking Dreams is a pseudo psychedelic tight rope walk over fire. Teetering between the thin parameters between reality and illusion bringing viewers to the intersecting spaces where the parameters that define our perception of both continuous states of our minds existence blurring the lines between dream and reality, heaven and hell, pain and pleasure, through a period of Five Nights of Waking Dreams.

The film invites you to experience the world through the mental perspective of a neurological condition that effects the circadian rhythm and causes the most severe pain known to modern medicine. A prolonged cycle of sleep deprivation and pain trapped in a rotation between heaven and hell, dead clarity and hallucination.

The accompanying, mesmerizing, baroque rock sounds of the prolific composer of “Centrifugal Satz Clock” (the worlds largest musical collection ever) Steve Kusaba adds layers and dimensions to this visceral, prolific, experience.

Five Nights Of Waking Dreams

a Film By David B. Cartwright

Cast in order of appearance:

David B. Cartwright , Jazzmyn Hinz , Adrienne Cartwright , Mikayla Cartwright , Cassie Robinson,

With Appearances By: Sitha , Dr Valentine Ojo , Jorn K. Bramann

Produced By:

KraZy KiDD TeLepRDucTionS Created from an original concept by:

David B. Cartwright and Steve Kusaba

Soundtrack Composed By:

Steve Kusaba

Featuring :

Alex Ferris and Anarchestra

Featuring the Poetry of: Daniel Moore


winner of the audience choice award from "the southern Maryland Film Festival"
official selection :
Festival Internacional de Cinema da Figueira da Foz - 2016/17

Grand IndieWise Convention - 2016/17
